metadata.name: qichang-webagent
metadata.summary: This package is a improved version of LaVague

methods.name: qichang_webagent.core.navigation.NavigationEngine.execute_instruction_gradio
documentation:
Generates code and executes it to answer the instruction

Args:
    instruction (`str`): The instruction to perform

Return:
    `bool`: True if the code was executed without error
    `Any`: The output of navigation is always None

methods.name: qichang_webagent.core.navigation.NavigationEngine._verify_llm_reponse
documentation: Make sure the action is performed on a given context to avoid hallucination

methods.name: qichang_webagent.core.navigation.NavigationEngine.execute_instruction
documentation:
Generates code and executes it to answer the instruction

Args:
    instruction (`str`): The instruction to perform

Return:
    `bool`: True if the code was executed without error
    `Any`: The output of navigation is always None

NavigationEngine leverages the llm model and the to output code from the prompt and the html page.

Args:
    driver (`BaseDriver`):
        The Web driver used to interact with the headless browser
    llm (`BaseLLM`)
        llama-index LLM that will generate the action
    retriever (`BaseHtmlRetriever`)
        Specify which algorithm will be used for RAG
    prompt_template (`PromptTemplate`)
        Squelette of the final prompt
    extractor (`BaseExtractor`)
        Specify how to extract the final code from the llm answer
    time_between_actions (`float`)
        Time between each action
    logger: (`AgentLogger`)
        Logger to log the actions taken by the agent
    embedding: (`BaseEmbedding`)
        Embedding to use for the retriever

classes.name: qichang_webagent.core.listener.EventListener

methods.name: qichang_webagent.core.listener.EventListener.listen_next_action
documentation:
Listens for the next user action (such as a click) on elements that match the given xpaths, and prevent default behaviour.
This method blocks until an action is detected or a timeout occurs, unless no_timeout is set to True.
If xpaths is None all actions will be listened for.
Returns a dictionary containing information about the detected action.

methods.name: qichang_webagent.core.listener.EventListener.listen_next_action_async
documentation: Same as listen_next_action but async with a callback.

methods.name: qichang_webagent.core.listener.EventListener.listen
documentation:
Listen for user actions and execute the provided callback until the listener is stopped.
Returns a destructor function that can be used to stop listening for events.

A utility class for listening to DOM events using a JS executor.

This class provides methods to listen for specific user actions (like clicks) on web elements
identified by their XPath and execute a callback function upon detection.

functions.name: qichang_webagent.core.extractors.simplify_xpath_dict
documentation:
Simplifies a dictionary by removing longer keys that have another key as prefix
when they share the same value.

Args:
    xpath_dict (Dict[str, str]): Dictionary mapping XPath to text content

Returns:
    Dict[str, str]: Simplified dictionary with redundant keys removed

Example:
    Input: {
        "/html/div": "text",
        "/html/div/span": "text",
        "/form": "submit",
        "/form/button": "submit",
        "/form/div/button": "submit"
    }
    Output: {
        "/html/div": "text",
        "/form": "submit"
    }

functions.name: qichang_webagent.core.extractors.xpath_text_map
documentation:
Maps XPath expressions to corresponding text content in HTML. Args: html_content (str): HTML string to parse xpath_list (List[str]): List of XPath expressions Returns: Dict[str, str]: Dictionary mapping XPath to text content Example: html_str = "
Text
" xpaths = ["/html/body/div"] result = xpath_text_map(html_str, xpaths)

documentation: Computes token costs for LLM according to the pricing data available in pricing_config.yaml

methods.name: qichang_webagent.core.token_counter.TokenCounter.count_tokens
documentation: Helper function to sum token counts for a list of events that belong together

Token counter for each of MM LLM and embedding models.
It relies on TokenCountingHandler from llama_index.
Only one token counter can be used at a time.

classes.name: qichang_webagent.core.action_engine.ActionEngine

methods.name: qichang_webagent.core.action_engine.ActionEngine.from_context
documentation: Create an ActionEngine from a context

methods.name: qichang_webagent.core.action_engine.ActionEngine.dispatch_instruction_gradio
documentation:
Dispatch the instruction to the appropriate ActionEngine

Args:
    next_engine_name (`str`): The name of the engine to call
    instruction (`str`): The instruction to perform

Return:
    `bool`: True if the code was executed without error
    `Any`: The output of the code

methods.name: qichang_webagent.core.action_engine.ActionEngine.dispatch_instruction
documentation:
Dispatch the instruction to the appropriate ActionEngine

Args:
    next_engine_name (`str`): The name of the engine to call
    instruction (`str`): The instruction to perform

Return:
    `bool`: True if the code was executed without error
    `Any`: The output of the code

ActionEngine is a wrapper that instantiate every other engines (Navigation Engine, Python Engine, Navigation Control)

Args:
    driver (`BaseDriver`):
        The Web driver used to interact with the headless browser
    python_engine (`BaseActionEngine`)
        Python Engine for generating code that doesn't interact with an html page.
    navigation_control (`BaseActionEngine`)
        Navigation Control
    llm (`BaseLLM`)
        llama-index LLM that will generate the action
    embedding (`BaseEmbedding`)
        llama-index Embedding model
    retriever (`BaseHtmlRetriever`)
        Specify which algorithm will be used for RAG
    prompt_template (`PromptTemplate`)
        Squelette of the final prompt
    extractor (`BaseExtractor`)
        Specify how to extract the final code from the llm answer
    time_between_actions (`float`)
        Time between each action
    logger: (`AgentLogger`)
        Logger to log the actions taken by the agent

classes.name: qichang_webagent.core.retrievers.FromXPathNodesExpansionRetriever
documentation:
Retriever with expansion of HTML context around interactive elements (`chunk_size` in characters),
then semantic contraction up to `top_k` results (number of chunks).
Expansion is symmetrical so every step will add previous and next sibling.
If no more sibling is present, then context is extended to parent node.
When interactive chunks intersect, they are merged together.
